title: Icedmi's Blueprint
description: Brings a fun look to your crafting environment. Supports both the inventory crafting grid and the crafting table !
body:
**Crafting's boring ? It doesn't have to be.**

Very simple resource pack (4 textures, 5 counting the logo) aiming to make your game experience that-much more fun, changes both the crafting table and crafting grid in your inventory to look like a blueprint, as the name suggests!

/!\ Versions prior to 1.21 will not see the recipe book be changed, support will be added shortly.
